title: Three Billy Goats Gruff (Troll Under the Bridge)
summary: The troll roars from beneath the bridge - dramatic, gravelly menacing voice.
prompt: "WHO is that trip-trapping over MY bridge?" roared the troll, his ugly head poking out from beneath the wooden planks. His eyes were as big as saucers, and his nose was as long as a poker. "I am going to gobble you UP!" The little billy goat trembled, but he had a clever plan, and he answered in the smallest voice he could find.
